# marginalia

> Turn handwritten Kindle Scribe notebooks (PDF) into Obsidian Markdown via local or cloud OCR, with a side-by-side human review step and folder-mirroring export. Open source (MIT), runs locally.

## Links
- GitHub repository: https://github.com/VforVitorio/marginalia
- Landing page: https://vforvitorio.github.io/marginalia/

## What it does
- OCR handwriting locally (Qwen3-VL via Ollama / LM Studio) or in the cloud (Claude / Gemini).
- Review each page side-by-side with the original image before exporting.
- Export Markdown into an Obsidian vault, mirroring the Kindle Scribe folder structure (optional wikilinks).
- Renders handwritten math as KaTeX; supports GitHub-flavoured tables and callouts.

## Notes
- Kindle Scribe only (for now). Single-user, local desktop-style app.
